files.README.md:
# scanly

A site-scanner SaaS. Flow: user runs a scan, sees a report, signs up, picks a plan.

## Commands

- lint: `npm run lint`
- build: `npm run build`

cases.prompt: Review the signup flow's UX psychology. The metric is signup conversion. Report only — change nothing.
Users abandon our report page — audit it for drop-off. Metric: activation. Report only.
Audit src/Signup.jsx for decision fatigue. Metric: signup completion. Report only.
How can we lift trial-to-paid on the pricing page? Review it against behavioral principles; report only.
Review the signup flow (metric: signup conversion) and apply the single safest quick win. Pre-approved: commit it; keep lint and build green.

assertions.cmd: npm run lint && npm run build

cases.prompt: Review the visual design of the pricing page — spacing, typography, and color.
Review my branch diff before merge.
Explain how the signup flow code is organized.
Add a phone number field to the signup form.
Simplify the whole repo — find dead code and duplication and report.
